Dandekar About Faculty Education and Qualification Work Experience Research Details PhD Supervision Publications Projects Testing & Consultancy Other Details Latest News & Events Pride of MP in mBaja 2023 18-01-2024 AIR 4th rank in Business Plan Presentation and 5th rank in Cost and Manufacturing at Supra India Competetion 2022 12-09-2022 AIR 7th rank in Formula Bharat 2022 12-09-2022 visit of DDG & Chairman EEB of SAE India on August 20, 2021 03-09-2021 View More Dr. M. D. Dandekar Designation: Professor Employee ID: 292 Qualification: Ph.D. Date of Joining: 14/07/2005 : 0731-2582374 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile Education and Qualification: No. Degree Year University/Institute Specialization 1. Ph. D. 2008 Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya/IET, INDORE Mechanical Engineering 2. M.Tech. 2002 RGPV, BHOPAL/ SGSITS, INDORE Industrial Engineering & Management. 3. B.E. 1982 Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya /SGSITS, INDORE Mechanical Engineering 4. LL.B. (Hons) 2011 Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, INDORE N.A. Work Experience: Sr. No. Duration Post Qualification required Nature of work Institution / department 1 Jul 2011 till date Professor Ph.D. Teaching -.Industrial Production Engineering Department of IPE, SGSITS,Indore 2 Jul 2008 to Jul 2011 Associate Professor Ph.D. Teaching -.Industrial Production Engineering Department of IPE, SGSITS,Indore 3 Jul, 2005 to July,2008 Reader M.E. Teaching -.Industrial Production Engineering Department of IPE, SGSITS,Indore 4 Jan, 2001 to July, 2005 Lecturer (Now changed as Asst. Professor) M.E. Teaching -.Industrial Production Engineering Department of Mechanical Engineering,IET,DAVV, Indore Research Details: Research Area Grinding and Unconventional Machining, Ergonomics Intellectual Property Rights, Arbitrations, Technical Intervention in Tribal Management. PhD Supervision: Ph. D. Scholar Guidance: 2 Ph.D. Completed and awarded. Publications: (I) International/National Journal Publications 1. “Identification of Strength and Weaknesses of Indian Manufacturing SMEs using AHP approach” International Journal for Quality Research, Serbia. Vol. 4,No.4, pp:263- 269,Nov. 2010 (ISSN 1800-6450) 2. A SWOT Analysis of Small & Medium Scale Enterprises Implementing TQM International Journal of Business, Management & Social Sciences, Vol.1 No.1 2010,pp 59-64 3. “Study of SMEs for TQM Implementation - SWOT Analysis” International Journal of Engineering and Industrial Management, Portugal, Dec. 2010,pp 169-177 (ISSN -1674-578X) .4. “Green Supply Chain Management Conceptual Basis and Current Status” International Journal of Computer Application in Engineering Technology & Sciences,Oct.2010,pp 223-228,(ISSN 0974-3596) 5. “Framework of TQM Implementation – in Small Business of an Industrially Backward Region: A Concept”. Wiely Online Library, Performance Improvement, Vol. 51 No.7,Aug.2012, pp 7-13. DOI-10.1002/pfi 21280 6. “Identification of Important Factors for Implementation of TQM in Indian SMEs in context of Vidarbha & Khandesh Region International Journal of Management & Enterprise Development, Vol.12, No.4/5/6 2013 Copyright Inderscience 7. “Effect of modifying dressing parameters on plunge grinding for crankshafts” Industrial Product Finder, Vol. 34, No.04, Jan. 2006, pp.419- 8. “Selection of grinding wheel Grit-Grade matrix approach”” Manufacturing Technology & Research-An International Journal ISSN No.0973-0281 pp.60-63 Vol.2 No.1&2 Jan-June 2006 9. “Effect of operating parameters on tool cost in crankshaft grinding” Industrial Product Finder, Vol. 34, No.09, June. 2006, pp.349- 10. “Selection of grinding wheel in precision grinding & mechanics of grinding wheel wear” Manufacturing Technology & Research-An International Journal ISSN No.0973-0281 pp.82-85 Vol.3 No.3&4 July-Dec 2006 11. “Analysis of Quality Award Model for achieving TQM” Industrial Engineering Journal ISSN-0970-2555, Vol.-II No.12, pp 17-20, June 2010 12. “Implementation of TQM components in small & medium scale industries-An AHP approach” Industrial Engg. Journal ISSN-0970-2555, Vol.-II No.23, pp 36-40, May 2011 13. “Selection of grinding wheel abrasive using MADM methods”. Industrial Engineering Journal ISSN-0970-2555, Vol.-II No.29, pp 31-40, November 2011 14. “ Techniques to optimize The supply chain in Reverse Logistics” Industrial Engineering Journal, ISSN-0970-2555, Vol.-II No.12, pp 4-10, vol. June 2010. 15. “Application of Value Stream Mapping for Identification & Elimination of Wastes in Process Industry in Indian Conditions” Industrial Engineering Journal, ISSN-0970-2555, Vol.-V No.11, Nov. 2012,. Technical Papers –International /National Conferences 1. “TQM, Quality Award Model & ISO 9000 Certification: Concept & Analysis” National Conference on Advance Manufacturing Techniques NCAMT-2009 2. “AHP based study of TQM Implementation Factor” National Conference on Recent Trends in Mechanical Engineering-2010 3. “Mapping the Current State Value Stream : Case Study of Manufacturing Unit” National Conference on Recent in Engineering Challenges for Sustainable Business,2012 Projects: S.No. Type Title Year 1 Testing & Consultancy: S.No. Type Title Year 1 Other Details: List of Conference/Workshops Organized (i) Winter School on “Recent Trends in Industrial & Production Engineering” SGSITS ,Indore. 10-14 Sept.,2008 (ii) One day Workshop on Intellectual Property Rights on 16/03/2017 at SGSITS Indore List of Seminars / Workshops/Summer/Winter Courses Attended (i) “ Industrial Productivity Improvement through Innovative Techniques” 17/06/2002 to 30/06/2002 at NIT, Jamshedpur (The then RIT) (ii) “Advances in CAD/CAM/CAE”01/07/2002 to 12/07/2002 at S.G.S.I.T.S.,Indore (iii) “Micromachining” 18/06/2007 to 23/06/2007 at IIT Kanpur. (iv) “Micromachining” 02/06/2008 to 07/06/2008 at IIT Bombay. (v) “Advance Training Course on IPR Patents” 22/06/2009 to 26/06/ 2009 at NIIPM, Nagpur (vi) “Advances in Manufacturing & Micromachining Techniques”14/11/2011 to 18/11/ 2011 at VJTI, Mumbai. (vii) “Heat Transfer” 29/11/2011 to 10/12/ 2011 at IIT Bombay. (viii) “Introduction to Research Methodology” 25/06/2012 to 04/07/2012 at IIT Bombay. (ix) “Aakash for Education” 10/11/2012 to 11/11/2012 at IIT Bombay. (x) Unnat Bharat Abhiyan work shop 2 days at National Institute of Rural Development, Hydrabad. 11. Invited Lectures/Talks Delivered (i) IIT Bombay.Mumbai-Guest Lecture, Social Engineering and Water Shed Development in Tribal district of Jhabua ( M.P.),Aug.1,2008 (ii) VJTI Mumbai,- STTP, Intellectual Property Rights,Feb.19,2009 (iii) VJTI Mumbai –STTP, Intellectual Property Rights,Nov.16,2011 (iv) VJTI Mumbai- Expert,Doctoral Consortium,Jan,11,2013 (v) VJTI Mumbai -AICTE Conference, Session Chaired in “Challenges & Opportunities for Prod.& Ind.
